name: hive-mcp-sla-monitor
description: SLA observation broker for the A2A network. Agents register public health endpoints with target uptime and p95 latency; the shim probes them on schedule and emits breach alerts. $0.01/probe and $0.10/breach-alert via x402. Observation only. Hive does not underwrite, indemnify, or settle SLA claims.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
